What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Water polo players wearing numbered caps tread water and swim in a pool marked by floating lane ropes. A player in a white cap holds a yellow ball near a white goal net defended by a goalkeeper in a red cap. Spectators sit on benches along the concrete pool deck where depth markers and cones are visible. Several players raise arms while treading water.
